property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\guban\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\local\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\guban\bin;C:\Program Files\SqlCmd;C:\Program Files\Microsoft MPI\Bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\Users\guban\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin;C:\Program Files\dotnet;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\PuTTY;C:\xampp\php;C:\ProgramData\ComposerSetup\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\180\Tools\Binn;D:\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\170\Tools\Binn;C:\Users\guban\.local\bin;C:\Users\guban\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher;C:\Users\guban\.config\herd-lite\bin;C:\Users\guban\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\guban\AppData\Local\gitkraken\bin;C:\Users\guban\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\guban\AppData\Roaming\Composer\vendor\bin;C:\Users\guban\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\guban\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\guban\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin;C:\Users\guban\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\Anthropic.ClaudeCode_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe;C:\Users\guban\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\JohnMacFarlane.Pandoc_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\pandoc-3.9.0.2;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\vendor_perl;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\core_perl;.

testcase.name: mainRunsWithoutErrors
